content: The 2024-2025 generation of state-of-the-art active learning agent memory systems can be augmented by a tiered intrinsic reward gate that weights curiosity signals from ICM (Intrinsic Curiosity Module) and RND (Random Network Distillation) differently based on the episodic relevance of stored memory entries. This means agents can prioritize querying human annotations for high-uncertainty, high-novelty memory traces that drive long-term task improvement, rather than wasting annotation budget on trivial surprising events.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
